channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLhealthAndWellness
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLhealthAndWellness, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: 2 Minute Medicine Rewind July 20, 2026
item.description: Advanced medical care at home for patients with acute heart failure following hospitalization for decompensated heart failure.

item.title: Chemo Tied to Longer Survival After Pelvic Exenteration
item.description: A retrospective international study indicates adjuvant chemotherapy may improve survival after pelvic exenteration in high-risk patients.

item.title: Dementia patients gain peace, connection from live concert series
item.description: Live concerts offer dementia patients peace and connection, as lifelong learning may help combat cognitive decline.

item.title: When the Algorithm Knows the Risk but Misses the Fear
item.description: AI may identify low clinical risk but overlook a patient's fear, story, and lived experience, as reported by Medscape News Europe.
